code:
---
config:
  logLevel: 'debug'
  theme: 'base'
---
gitGraph
    %% Step 1: Initial state: main branch with v1.0.0 tag
    commit id: "1.0.0" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Step 2: Create release/1 from main for next release preparation
    branch release/1 order: 2
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.1"
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.2"

    %% Step 3: Create release/2 from the second commit of release/1 (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    %% release/1 at this point: 1.0.1-rc.1.post.2, so release/2 continues from there
    checkout release/1
    branch release/2 order: 1
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.3"

    %% Step 4: Go back to release/1 and add the problematic third commit (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.3" tag: "issues found"

    %% Step 5: release/2 completes preparation successfully
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.4"

    %% Step 6: Merge release/2 to main and release v1.1.0
    checkout main
    merge release/2 id: "1.1.0" tag: "v1.1.0"
repo_description: Automatic versioning for every commit - Generate semantic versions from any commit across all branches, or dirty working directory, with seamless pre-release handling and flexible format support for a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下IoT工业控制系统1.0.0版本之后的发布流程。目前main分支上已经有v1.0.0标签，接下来要准备1.1.0版本。我打算从main拉两条发布分支：release/1和release/2，分别对应PLC逻辑模块和执行器控制器模块的迭代。
明白了。我先确认一下分支创建顺序：release/1先从main切出来，做两个预发布提交1.0.1-rc.1.post.1和1.0.1-rc.1.post.2。然后release/2是从release/1的第二个提交点再切出来，对吗？这样release/2的order应该比release/1更靠前？
对，release/2的order设为1，release/1设为2。release/2走PLC逻辑模块的稳定路线，release/1继续开发执行器控制器。但后续release/1的第三次提交会出现问题，需要标记出来。
好的，我现在把结构画出来：main先有v1.0.0，然后release/1切出来做两次提交。release/2从release/1的第二个提交点切出，做1.0.1-rc.2.post.3。接着release/1回去做第三次提交并打上"issues found"标签。release/2再做一次post.4提交完成准备。
等等，release/2的第二次提交应该是post.4不是post.3吧？你刚才说的post.3已经是第一次提交了。另外最后一步是把release/2合并回main，发布v1.1.0。
抱歉，我搞混了。release/2的提交序列是：先post.3，再post.4。然后checkout main，把release/2合并进去，生成1.1.0提交并打v1.1.0标签。这样release/1因为执行器控制器有问题就被弃用了，只有release/2的PLC逻辑模块成功发布。
没错，这就是完整的流程。release/1虽然有三个提交，但第三次有问题，所以最终只有release/2合并到main。整个图需要开启debug级别的日志，用base主题。
已完成。最终结构：main分支保留v1.0.0起点，release/1独立发展带问题标记，release/2成功合并生成v1.1.0。两条发布分支的order设置确保了PLC逻辑线在左侧，执行器控制器线在右侧，视觉层次清晰。
